name: Soaring Storm
additional_info: Proc condition is removed and damage is increased if in True Strength. Applies to all forms of uppercuts, including Mantras and certain weapon criticals. Deals 24 Oath + Slash damage (6 hits that deal 4 damage each), this is increased to 39 damage (6 hits that deal 6.5 damage each) if you are in True Strength.
desc: Empower your uppercuts with the way of the blade, after Lithe Stepping, flourishing, or landing an Oath ability.
